# Quick Fix: Canonical action count 150→250 + benchmark + footer fixes

### Action count: 150 → 250

- `apps/web/src/components/sections/OSProductSection.tsx` line 10 — feature title `"150+ reversible actions"` → `"250 reversible actions"`
- `apps/web/src/components/sections/OSProductSection.tsx` line 45 — checklist item `"All 150+ actions"` → `"All 250 actions"`
- `apps/web/src/app/why-redcore/page.tsx` line 85 — comparison item `"150+ actions categorized..."` → `"250 actions categorized..."`

- `apps/web/src/app/redcore-os/page.tsx` line 19 — metadata description `"250+ reversible actions, 5 profiles"` → `"250 reversible actions, 8 profiles"` (also fixed profile count mismatch)

### BenchmarkSection — removed contradictory RAM stat card

- `apps/web/src/components/sections/BenchmarkSection.tsx` — removed `"800MB+ RAM Freed"` stat card (contradicts comparison bars showing 4.2→2.1 GB = 2.1 GB freed)
- Removed unused `MemoryStick` import
- Changed footnote from `"Tested on 10+ machines. Stock Windows vs. redcore OS, balanced profile. No cherry-picked configs."` → `"Tested on stock Windows 11 23H2. Balanced profile. Results vary by hardware."`

### Footer duplicate word

- `apps/web/src/components/sections/FooterSection.tsx` line 44 — `"optimization and optimization"` → `"optimization"` (single word, sentence restructured per spec)
